name: Priya Raman
notes: Met at an Austin robotics meetup. Open to a referral chat.

outreach.body: Hi Priya — enjoyed your talk on sim-to-real for pick-and-place. I just shipped a small grasp-planning demo and would love your read on the perception roadmap at Meridian.

name: Marcus Bell
notes: Cold prospect — strong fit for the forward-deployed role.

name: Dana Okonkwo
notes: Replied warmly, suggested a coffee in two weeks.

outreach.subject: Following up on our chat
outreach.body: Thanks again Dana — circling back as promised. Free for a quick coffee next week?
